name: Entra ID Newly Created Privileged Accounts
description: Detects privileged Entra ID accounts created in the last 7 days for expedited review.
query: SELECT u.id AS id, u.display_name AS account_name, u.created_datetime AS created_at FROM entra_users u WHERE COALESCE(u.account_enabled, true) = true AND (LOWER(COALESCE(u.user_type, '')) LIKE '%admin%' OR LOWER(COALESCE(u.user_type, '')) LIKE '%owner%' OR LOWER(COALESCE(u.user_type, '')) LIKE '%super%') AND u.created_datetime > NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
remediation: Confirm change tickets and owner approval for newly created privileged accounts.
